programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: The Murder Business Part 1

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: Trapping a Serial Killer Part 2

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Magic Man's Best Friend
programme.desc: Chris, Wes and Alex convince Eric to get a dog for his girlfriend. Chris reads people's minds and Eric rolls trick shots in a bowling alley.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Silence
programme.desc: Zoey tries to help Mitch’s caregiver, Howie, reconnect with his estranged daughter. Max must make a decision about his future at SPRQ Point.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Outburst
programme.desc: Zoey surprisingly finds herself getting into major conflict with Simon, Max, Mo and even Howie. Tensions arise at SPRQ Point when the fourth and sixth floors compete over an important piece of code. Mitch and Maggie try to celebrate their anniversary.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Mother
programme.desc: Zoey has to figure out a clever way to help her mother with an impossible decision. Max unexpectedly bonds with Leif. Mo hits a rough patch with Eddie.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Dad
programme.desc: After hearing an ominous song, Zoey does everything in her power to stop something bad from happening.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Return
programme.desc: Zoey returns to the world after an extended time away and discovers that a lot has changed at work and in her personal life in her absence.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Distraction
programme.desc: Zoey's attempts to spend private time with Max are continually thwarted by both Mo and work problems.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Dreams
programme.desc: Zoey is haunted by bad dreams that start to affect her personal life. Jenna helps Maggie find her creative spark again.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Employee
programme.desc: Zoey tries to 'choose happiness' but finds it is easier said than done. David re-evaluates his priorities. Mo and Max face their first real challenge as business partners.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Trip
programme.desc: Zoey decides to explore her rebellious side with her neighbor from growing up, Aiden. Max's dad comes to visit.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Reckoning
programme.desc: Simon wrestles with his future at SPRQ Point after calling out racial bias at the company. Mo and Max pitch a new investor for their business venture.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Memory
programme.desc: Zoey’s effort to recreate a cherished memory with Mitch is thwarted by Leif. Max and Mo have their big restaurant opening.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Birthday
programme.desc: It’s Zoey’s 30th birthday, but before she can celebrate properly she must confront her unresolved feelings for the men in her life.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Mystery
programme.desc: After going to see a medium, Zoey’s powers mysteriously start glitching again.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Girl's Night
programme.desc: Zoey gets more than she bargained for when she tries to help Emily with a problem. Maggie reconnects with an old friend.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Double Date
programme.desc: Zoey attempts to throw all her energy into her relationship, but things get complicated when a double date doesn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Session
programme.desc: In therapy, Zoey reflects back on her unexpectedly profound first day working at SPRQPoint.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Zoey's Extraordinary Goodbye
programme.desc: Zoey must face a difficult goodbye.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On Again
programme.desc: When students can't get onto their college cheerleading team, they form their own squad.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: In It to Win It
programme.desc: Rival high school cheerleading squads go to extremes to win the 'Cheer Camp Nationals'.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: Fight to the Finish
programme.desc: After her widowed mother remarries a wealthy man, Lina must transfer from her high school in East LA to a posh, West Los Angeles high school where she clashes with Avery, the ultra-competitive cheerleading captain when she tries to qualify for the team.

programme.title: Movie: Bring It On: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Life is good for Britney Allen, making her the envy of all girls at Pacific Vista High School. All comes to a halt when her father's job moves them out of their posh neighbourhood forcing Britney to join the squad of her rival school.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG's Salute To Summer

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Salute the Troops

programme.title: Movie: Teen Titans Go! To the Movies
programme.desc: When the Teen Titans realize that pretty much every other superhero has had a movie made about him or her, they go in search of an arch-nemesis in order to get noticed by Hollywood, but the villain they go after proves to be more dangerous than planned.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Was 'Mame,' Mom
programme.desc: Charlie makes Alan pose as his life partner at a work party in order to impress a gay ad executive.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon
programme.desc: Charlie reacts oddly after an evening with his mother, and Alan's date reacts oddly after having sex with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Damn You, Eggs Benedict
programme.desc: Charlie tries cooking, Alan tries dating two women at the same time and Jake tries beer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo
programme.desc: Jake disappears with the daughter of Charlie's neighbour, a former NFL player, and Charlie is left to cover his back. Meanwhile, Alan scores a hot date with the help of Charlie's Mercedes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Two Finger Rule
programme.desc: Charlie joins Alan, Herb and his next-door neighbour in a night of alcohol-fuelled sexual reminiscences, after Chelsea finds nude pictures of another woman on his phone.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Gorp. Fnark. Schmegle
programme.desc: Chelsea invites her beautiful college roommate to stay at the house while she gets over a bad break-up.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twanging Your Magic Clanger
programme.desc: Charlie has trouble adjusting to dating a woman who is slightly older than him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Precedent Nixin
programme.desc: Carrie plans to avoid her in-laws by staying at a hotel in Florida but it all goes awry.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Tank Heaven
programme.desc: Doug sabotages Carrie's attempts to hang out with her co-workers by scaring them off.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Altar Ego
programme.desc: Doug and the guys take a trip to try and stop Spence's ex-girlfriend from getting married.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awful Bigamy
programme.desc: Doug is reluctant to let Holly move in with them after she gets kicked out of her place.

programme.title: Roseanne: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne resolve to lose weight but learn it's not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Roseanne: All of Me
programme.desc: Roseanne is not as enthusiastic about Jackie's new man as Jackie is.

programme.title: Roseanne: To Tell the Truth
programme.desc: Roseanne's meddling causes Jackie to stop talking to her.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Suspicious Encounters
programme.desc: A check for a fishing license takes an unlikely turn and an abandoned car is found on private property. Wardens Sellers and Roraback are in pursuit of illicit hunters, and zebra mussels are suspected of being illegally transported in Llano County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Dog
programme.desc: Dove season starts off with a bang, keeping wardens across the state busy from sunrise to sundown. Texas Game Wardens must relocate a 500-lb gator that's loose in a suburban area. Wardens uncover a large marijuana grow-op hidden in a wildlife preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught By Surprise
programme.desc: Warden Price is on a mission to arrest out-of-state hunters with warrants for trespassing and hunting on private property. A young angler is haunted by his past and is taken to county jail, and Warden Richards questions a pair of dishonest fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Tempers Are Rising
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign. Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run, and Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wake of Destruction
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mallory Mitchell and Jeremy Lindsey intervene when an overloaded boat and unruly jet skiers put lives at risk. Game Warden Randolph McGee investigates reports of a wild hog being tortured, while other game wardens round up a willy alligator.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer

programme.desc: Eivin hauls a huge pole barn to his homestead. Jewel arrives for a visit. August builds a one-of-a-kind outhouse.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: Movie: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A dangerous escaped convict poses as a man having car trouble in order to invade the home of a former District Attorney, who is there alone with her two small children.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Simple Plan
programme.desc: When Frank refuses to give Nikki and Kim a discount on a car, they buy one at an auction.

programme.title: The Parkers: It's a Spring Bling Thing
programme.desc: Kim's band Freestyle Unity is booked to perform at a spring-break concert in Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Parkers: Moving on Out
programme.desc: Kim moves into an apartment with Stevie to try and gain more independence from her mom.

programme.title: The Parkers: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Nikki's father holds a grudge toward Nikki for getting pregnant with Kim at an early age.

programme.title: The Parkers: Since I Lost My Baby

programme.title: The Parkers: Get Me to the Church on Time
programme.desc: Kim questions her relationship with Jerel and decides they should just get married.

programme.title: The Parkers: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Nikki races from one Las Vegas chapel to the next to find Kim before it's too late.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Gold Digger
programme.desc: Brown meets his soul mate, but she may be after more than his heart. Brianna gets arrested for shoplifting at the mall.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Cougars
programme.desc: When Brianna invites a boy from school over to the house, the 17-year-old boy develops a crush on Sasha. Brianna gets upset with Sasha, thinking she's trying to steal her boyfriend.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't Nuttin' Goin' on But the Rent
programme.desc: Martin and the gang stick out the weather after his landlord cuts off the heat.

programme.title: Martin: The Ex-Files
programme.desc: Gina and Martin go out to dinner with their ex-lovers to see who would be more jealous.

programme.title: Martin: All the Players Came
programme.desc: Martin organizes a fundraiser to help save a failing theater in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Martin: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Tommy and Cole try to outdo each other in the hopes of being chosen as Martin's best man.

programme.title: The Chi: Pilot
programme.desc: A fateful event sends shockwaves through a community on the South Side of Chicago and connects the lives of Brandon, Ronnie, Emmett and Kevin in wholly unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Chi: Alee
programme.desc: Brandon reels from a loss as Ronnie realizes he's made a mistake. Meanwhile, Emmett's carefree life is upended, and Papa and Jake taunt Kevin over his crush on Andrea. Detective Cruz is shaken by conflicting clues in the investigation.

programme.title: The Chi: Ghosts
programme.desc: Brandon asks Kevin for help as Laverne and Greavy make a life-changing decision. Meanwhile, Amir looks to capitalize on Emmett's side gig while Quentin returns to town to launch his own investigation.

programme.title: The Chi: Quaking Grass
programme.desc: Brandon seeks refuge after Jerrika kicks him out and a physically and mentally ailing Ronnie runs into Rafiq. Meanwhile, Quentin takes a valued item from Trice while Kevin's quest ends with Brandon making a bad deal with Reg.

programme.title: The Chi: Today was a Good Day
programme.desc: A neighbourhood block party brings Brandon, Ronnie, Emmett and Kevin together. Brandon has a confrontation with Ronnie and gets surprised by Jerrika.

programme.title: The Chi: Penetrate a Fraud
programme.desc: Brandon's actions jeopardize his relationship with Jerrika. Ronnie uncovers secrets about his surrogate son's past and gives a crucial piece of information to the police. Meanwhile, Emmett's shoe hustle goes awry.

programme.title: The Chi: The Whistle
programme.desc: Brandon compromises his employment by defending a co-worker. Emmett spends an eye-opening day with Quentin. At the roller rink, Kevin tries to get Andrea's attention.

programme.title: The Chi: Wallets
programme.desc: Brandon branches out on his own, while Emmett searches for his son after Tiffany takes him away. Ronnie seeks redemption at a mosque where he meets Rafiq. Kevin tries to stop his best friend from going down a dark path.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick
programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: John Wick is brought out of retirement again by a former associate that plans to take over a shadowy international assassin's guild. Forced by a blood oath to help, Wick heads to Rome and faces off against hordes of deadly killers and assassins.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Futurama: Free Will Hunting
programme.desc: Bender tries to find the meaning of life after he learns that being a robot means he has no free will.

programme.title: Futurama: Near-Death Wish

programme.title: Futurama: Viva Mars Vegas

programme.title: Futurama: 31st Century Fox

programme.title: Futurama: Naturama

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: A lieutenant in the Second World War has the power to see which of his soldiers will die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: A man discovers his life is just a movie script and he is an actor playing the role.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: A man learns his future son-in-law is immortal and tries to stop the marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: A submarine captain on a rescue mission in the Arctic Ocean discovers that the Russian president has been kidnapped and that a coup is in progress. With the world teetering on the brink of WWIII, he must navigate enemy waters to rescue the President.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: John Wick is brought out of retirement again by a former associate that plans to take over a shadowy international assassin's guild. Forced by a blood oath to help, Wick heads to Rome and faces off against hordes of deadly killers and assassins.

programme.title: Home Town: Retreat Yourself
programme.desc: Angie took a huge leap of faith when she quit her New York job to work as a producer on 'Home Town.' After falling in love with Laurel, Mississippi, she's ready to make it her permanent address, and Ben and Erin help their boss find her dream home.

programme.title: Home Town: All in the Family
programme.desc: Erin's uncle, Danny, likes to go big when it comes to restoring old houses, and he's not concerned about the budget. Together with his son, Jim, Ben and Erin try to convince him that bigger isn't always better in a historical home renovation.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Say Yes to Wetumpka
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honoring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name. Then, guests Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day, and Mina Starsiak Hawk helps renovate the home of two local heroes.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: A Little Spark Can Go a Long Way
programme.desc: Taking on Wetumpka's main thoroughfare, Ben and Erin get some help from Steve Ford and Tamara Day to give each storefront individual flair. Meanwhile, the Napiers add drama and function to a Craftsman owned by two dynamic women dedicated to theater.

programme.title: Home Town: Grand Style
programme.desc: A woman moving back to Laurel after being away for years wants a place big enough to accommodate her parents, kids and grandkids if they visit all at once. Erin can't wait to deliver on her ideal design plan: blue and white in the French provincial style.

programme.title: Home Town: The Cafe House
programme.desc: With an all in budget under $250k, Ben and Erin are able to give the Bell brothers a functioning cafe kitchen, beautiful cafe dining rooms, and an incredibly efficient apartment for Connor.

programme.title: Home Town: A Quiet Place to Call Home
programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: A Little Spark Can Go a Long Way
programme.desc: Taking on Wetumpka's main thoroughfare, Ben and Erin get some help from Steve Ford and Tamara Day to give each storefront individual flair. Meanwhile, the Napiers add drama and function to a Craftsman owned by two dynamic women dedicated to theater.

programme.title: Home Town: The Cafe House
programme.desc: With an all in budget under $250k, Ben and Erin are able to give the Bell brothers a functioning cafe kitchen, beautiful cafe dining rooms, and an incredibly efficient apartment for Connor.

programme.title: Home Town: A Quiet Place to Call Home
programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Sibling Split Level
programme.desc: Contractor Jeff's sister and brother-in-law want to move into their forever home, but they need to get their split level off the market. With a generous sibling discount and some creativity, Leslie and Lyndsay turn the home into a French country cottage.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: A Contemporary Cleanup
programme.desc: After his semi-hoarder house in a prime location sat on the market for months, it's getting handed over to the reluctant sisters. Lyndsay and Leslie transform problems into possibilities as they give this lackluster split level a contemporary facelift.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: First Hammer Swing
programme.desc: Ben and Erin begin revitalizing a small town by turning a foster couple's home into a welcoming space for kids. Dave and Jenny Marrs join in to help them tackle a boutique on the brink of closure, and a special guest surprises Wetumpka with a performance.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: The Mayor is Also the Barber
programme.desc: Ben and Erin step in to give a family and their iconic house a much-needed boost. Then, the Napiers and Hot Mess House's Wendell Holland unearth some original 1920s charm for a local barbershop that is both a community and political hub.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Longest Bar in Alabama
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams. Then, Texas Two Step's Jon Pierre and Mary assist the Napiers in opening up the local sports bars to stunning river views.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Say Yes to Wetumpka
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honoring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name. Then, guests Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day, and Mina Starsiak Hawk helps renovate the home of two local heroes.

programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier get the opportunity to find and restore a home for some long-time friends. They're hoping to find a historical house with a porch and cozy charm.

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place
programme.desc: After being away for 30 years, a woman dreams of retiring in the small town where she has fond memories of her childhood. With her all-in budget of $120,000, Erin designs an elegant home while Ben creates some unique builds including a laundry shoot.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Area 51 Crash, Airplane Abduction and Real-Life Sea Monster
programme.desc: At the Atomic Testing Museum in Las Vegas is a dusty metal plate. It was part of a mysterious plane wreck on the peak of Mt. Charleston, Nevada. For decades, all information about this crash was labeled 'classified.'

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Alaskan Sea Monster, Ben Franklin's Bones and Raining Frogs
programme.desc: It's Fall 2016 in Fairbanks, Alaska. While filming the banks of the Chena river, a photographer shoots footage of a snakelike object heading downstream. He posts the video online sparking many theories about what the creature is.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Prison Haunting, Monster in the Valley and UFO Police Car
programme.desc: The Old State Prison Museum in Deer Lodge, Montana, has a pair of concrete shoes that were used to punish a convict. His deeds still reverberate through the halls of this prison, causing some to believe he's serving more than a life sentence.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Jimmy Carter's UFO, The Secret of the Stardust and Nazca Lines
programme.desc: A strange tale of a UFO and a mystery that became forever tied to former President Jimmy Carter and his legacy. Terrifying ghostly apparitions haunt the researchers of a lonely lab in the heartland of England.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Hurricane Ghost, Nevada Giant and Exeter UFO Mystery
programme.desc: In October 1954, a cloaked figure awake William Collins while on his honeymoon in Pawleys Island, South Carolina and warned them to leave the island. Since no storm was predicted to make landfall, the couple are skeptical but head inland.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: The Witch Is Back, Swamp Ghost and Desert Giants
programme.desc: In 1817 the Bell family says their property is plagued by an evil witch, who appears to disappear when the patriarch dies. Then in 1964, a young couple becomes convinced the witch is back. Then, a bizarre creature lurks the bayous of Louisiana.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: Hitler Diaries, Cliff Palace and Project Azorian

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Search for the Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Four years after Josh Gates went on a journey to find the lost heart of Sultan Suleiman the Magnificent, he travels to the newly rediscovered town of Turbek for some shocking new revelations about the case.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Pyramid of Legends
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the ancient Maya city of El Mirador in search of the lost tombs of a mysterious ruling dynasty called the Snake Kings.

programme.title: See No Evil: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Larry Weaver spends the night in Sikeston, Missouri. The next day he vanishes without a trace. Police launch a statewide search and rescue mission, but only when they turn to surveillance cameras, do they find out the terrifying truth of what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Didn't Do Anything
programme.desc: A former escort hires a hitman to kill her husband. She thinks she's committed the perfect crime when officers notify her that he is dead. Little does she know that the police have been watching and recording her every move.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Fantasy Over Family
programme.desc: A troubled 29-year-old son gets kicked out of his parents' house after spending the family fortune on a web-cam model. But when his mother, father, and brother are found murdered, the young man insists he's innocent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Anna Repkina
programme.desc: The 'other woman' in a love triangle that ended in murder speaks out for the first time on network television.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Didn't Do Anything
programme.desc: A former escort hires a hitman to kill her husband. She thinks she's committed the perfect crime when officers notify her that he is dead. Little does she know that the police have been watching and recording her every move.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Fantasy Over Family
programme.desc: A troubled 29-year-old son gets kicked out of his parents' house after spending the family fortune on a web-cam model. But when his mother, father, and brother are found murdered, the young man insists he's innocent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Anna Repkina
programme.desc: The 'other woman' in a love triangle that ended in murder speaks out for the first time on network television.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Most Evil: Ranked: Control Killers
programme.desc: Dominant killers who assume physical and emotional control over their victims. Robert Gene Simmons, Gerard Schaefer, Richard Hooten, Robert Rhoades and David Dowler committed merciless acts, including sex crimes, against trusting victims.

programme.title: Redrum: An Imperfect Family
programme.desc: Rick and Suzanna Wamsley are at odds with their children. When the happy couple are found shot and stabbed to death in their own home at Christmastime, investigators must untie a tangled knot of family conflicts to solve the puzzling case.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: The Meanest Drunk in the South
programme.desc: Former police officer Warren Horinek was a mean drunk, so when his wife, Bonnie, ended up dead from a gunshot wound, he was convicted of her murder. His advocates believe Bonnie committed suicide and hope Chris and Fatima will help to free Horinek.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Gone in Less Than 3 Minutes
programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: When the sexy and beautiful Charlene is around, sparks fly. But the sparks aren't limited to one man. One after another, Josh, Jace, Tim and Casey all go crazy vying for her love. And while love is a many splendored thing, it can also have a body count.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal. Could this stem from a dispute at his other job as a radio DJ? A failing marriage? The possibilities seem endless.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor: The Heroes Who Fought Back
programme.desc: A look at the brave men and women who fought back and showed courage in the face of danger in the attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Set in Narragansett, Rhode Island
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes in Narragansett, Rhode Island, for many years, a couple finally buys a place of their own that needs a lot of work. Luckily he is a general contractor and ready to take on the challenge.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Transformation
programme.desc: After 20 years of renting on North Carolina's Outer Banks, two high school sweethearts are determined to purchase their forever home. They find a fixer-upper that's perfect for their family.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Six Degrees of Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes hog-wild with fantastic porky delights. Pork is as delicious as it is versatile, which allows these amazing carnival cooks to get creative. Whether it's grilled, smoked or even incorporated into dessert, it's time to pig out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzella Queen of the Dessert
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe enjoys German inspired carnival treats at Christkindlmarket Milwaukee. First Noah digs into the Austrian Alpine Daug which packs a cheese-stuffed bratwurst into a hearty roll topped with sauerkraut and potato salad.

programme.title: Snackmasters: KitKat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix challenges Chef Daniel Clifford and Chef Vivek Singh to make the perfect replica of a KitKat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Playmate

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Brendar the Barbarian

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: When Dragons Cry
programme.desc: To get the dragon’s tears needed for Axe, the group must first visit a magical marketplace, where Stacey’s meeting with a witch finally reveals Brendar’s complicated backstory.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Mapmaker, Mapmaker, Make Me a Map
programme.desc: In need of a unique custom map for their next quest, Brendar and the group attempt to wine and dine the only map maker in Gothmoria capable of creating the map they need.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: Young Dylan: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Young Dylan's grandmother decides to send him to live indefinitely with her affluent son's family. The Wilson family household is soon turned upside down as lifestyles clash between aspiring hip hop star and his straight-laced cousins.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Mother May I
programme.desc: Dylan writes a serious rap about his mom, prompting Martin to read his diary to find out if he's doing ok. Dylan catches him in the act, triggering an escalating run of everyone invading the others' privacy.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Teachable Moments
programme.desc: Rebecca is being bullied online, prompting Dylan to encourage Martin to respond to some of the posts. His posts are not anonymous, and the family must deal with the fallout.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework. His unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head when Dylan gets into a rap battle with the teacher.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Rebecca is babysitting Charlie and Dylan, but when a deliveryman arrives with a package from Dylan's mom, Rebecca and Dylan fight over the rule about not opening the door.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Rap Game
programme.desc: The family can't get any peace while Dylan plays the drums all day and night, and each tries to convince him that he needs to give up his new instrument for good.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Gift
programme.desc: Dylan has a dream about his mom returning to get him, and reveals that he doesn't want to leave. This becomes a reality when Viola reveals that Dylan's mom is back, and planning to take Dylan home with her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Between the Pines
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.
