programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Deals Undone
programme.desc: Mick faces a failing business deal while Abby is subpoenaed in an investigation against Wes. Later Kevin recovers from his fall at home.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Exes Mark the Spot
programme.desc: Abby and Trace seem finally ready to move forward. Jess, David and Bree try and untangle their complicated love triangle. Later, an emergency phone call puts Trace in trouble.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Secrets, Lies and School Supplies
programme.desc: Trace is bailed out by Abby and goes to his ailing father in the hospital; Abby is balancing work and mom life, worried about introducing Trace to her girls.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Pasts and Presents
programme.desc: Trace discovers Mick is going to sell the club, putting them at odds; Abby is put between Trace and Mick when it comes to the club's fate, and at work is overwhelmed by the O'Brien Trust files.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Photographs and Memories
programme.desc: Trace and Leigh finish their last song for the demo and send it to the record company. Abby discusses her possible future with Trace and they share a romantic moment. Megan helps Jess with her B&B website.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: It's Always Nashville
programme.desc: Trace makes his final preparations for the impending club opening and later Abby meets with Thomas to hear his side of the story about the O'Brien Trust.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Buried Treasures
programme.desc: Nell discovers a treasure map that Bree made as a teen and later, Abby meets a handsome widower in the PTA. Jess deals with a high maintenance customer and gets more than she bargains for when his true identity revealed.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Grand Openings
programme.desc: As the nightclub opening nears, Trace spends late nights practicing with Leigh and his band, while Mick fights city hall to receive a live music permit. Abby receives a promotion at work, but it leaves her with less time to spend with the family.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: All Our Yesterdays
programme.desc: Mick receives damaging information about Thomas, and considers whether to use it in their town hall debate over the family land trust. Jess plans a special meal to win David over, but is fearful to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Forest Through the Trees
programme.desc: Away from the distraction of technology, Abby and Trace talk about their past and the future during a camping getaway. With some encouragement from Nell, Mick and Thomas try to work out their differences in person.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: The Royal Court
programme.desc: After his band's music video goes viral, Trace receives offers from music executives, but tries to convince his band to give Mark Hall another shot. Abby, Nell and Megan spend family time together preparing a princess birthday party for Carrie.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Freefall
programme.desc: After Mark Hall offers Trace and his band a worldwide tour deal, Trace and Abby worry about how it might impact their future together.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: An Open Book
programme.desc: Just in time for the Chesapeake Shores Oyster Festival, Trace returns to Abby after three months on tour, only to discover a family in turmoil. Bree's completed manuscript turns out to be a thinly veiled story of the family.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: The Way We Were
programme.desc: With a nod to the past, Nell tries to save the Wish Fountain. Then, Abby discovers a never-opened letter that she sent to Trace and Mick inherits a sailboat.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: The Rock Is Going to Roll
programme.desc: While Jess and Bree in Maine visit David and his fabulously wealthy family, Trace's role in Abby's family is questioned. Meanwhile, everyone helps out running the B&B and Wordplay, and Connor learns the truth about Danielle.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Once Upon Ever After
programme.desc: While Jess and Bree discover David's parent’s secret plans, Abby joins Trace on tour. Thomas' vow renewal sparks Mick and Megan to re-evaluate their own relationship.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Love Eventually
programme.desc: With Trace still on the road, Abby and Trace find a way to combat the loneliness. With Simon in town, Bree has to define a new normal, as does Mick and Megan, who begin to suspect that old feelings never go away. Meanwhile, Sarah is injured on the job.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Here and There
programme.desc: Wes' new girlfriend reminds Abby that she might be the only 'mom' in Carrie and Caitlyn's life while David and Simon's presence puts Jess and Bree in an unusual position.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: It's Just Business
programme.desc: Trace discovers that the general manager of The Bridge stole large sums of money, pitting Trace and Mick against one another.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: All Our Tomorrows
programme.desc: Battle lines form after Megan reads Bree's manuscript, and Trace and Mick disagree over the future of the Bridge.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Forward to the Past
programme.desc: Chaos reigns with the closure of the Bridge, and the O’Brien’s are at war over Bree's manuscript. Meanwhile, a heartbroken Kevin visits Sarah's family in Philadelphia after being offered his dream job in Chesapeake Shores.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: Before a Following Sea
programme.desc: On the eve of the Chesapeake Shores Regatta, with Mick recruiting family members to join him on the water, Abby finally has to make a decision whether or not to break up with Trace for good.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores: The End Is Where We Begin
programme.desc: With Kevin mulling a marriage proposal to Sarah, Jess and David realize their new B&B in Tanglewood might not be right for them. Meanwhile, Bree finishes her new play.

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life

programme.desc: As the war between bikes and cars escalates, Acting Assistant Chief Fritz Howard deploys Major Crimes to solve a tragic hit and run. Lt. Provenza, frustrated by the never-ending contest to succeed Russell Traylor, contemplates retirement.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Amityville Horror: Evil in the House Part 2
programme.desc: Para psychologists and psychics descend on the house to investigate what really happened that night in Amityville.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: The Murder Business Part 1
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to his neighbors, Richard Kuklinski held a dark secret: he was the 'Iceman,' a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Iceman: Trapping a Serial Killer Part 2

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: We Meet Again

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Mudslinging Madness

programme.title: Moonshiners: Ice Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger invent a new recipe turning hundreds of jars of expired mandarin oranges into marketable liquor. Tickle and the Laws face headaches in their attempt to produce freeze-distilled apple liquor. Mike and Jerry make birch bark moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Another Man's Mash
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe with master distiller Richard Landry. Mark and Digger crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Basement Bust
programme.desc: Josh gains access to a cellar still site, but even help from the Laws can't keep trouble from surfacing. Mark and Digger innovate a way to cut the cost of water cooling, and bayou shiner Richard makes a medicinal moonshine from wild-grown manglier.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tennessee Whiskey
programme.desc: Mark and Digger discover a limestone source to make Tennessee Whiskey right under their feet. Just when Tim thought he was out, the Laws pulls him back in to cross state lines in search of a key ingredient. Richard turns cotton candy into moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Tons of Fun
programme.desc: Josh drives a tractor trailer full of stills across state lines to help Tickle and the Laws run two tons of malted corn. Mark and Digger christen their own secret Tennessee Whiskey distillery. Richard builds a copper Virginia-style submarine still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Capital Returns
programme.desc: Josh, Tickle and the Laws build a still farm the likes of which Virginia hasn't seen since the heyday of Amos Law. Jerry misses a day of work and Mike lets down his guard. Mark and Digger discover a rival moonshiner faces a reckoning with the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Backwoods Bonanza
programme.desc: In the season finale, with eight stills running full tilt, Tickle enlists Mrs. Tickle to stash too much shine. Mark and Digger devise a way to age their Tennessee whiskey at sea. Tim gets drawn into an epic bootleg, while Mike and Jerry face the law.

programme.desc: After Dr. Sturgis experiences a nervous breakdown, Mary worries Sheldon is headed down a similar path. Also, Georgie discovers he has a knack for sales.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Broom Closet and Satan's Monopoly Board
programme.desc: Without Dr. Sturgis’ university class, Sheldon must find a new way to stay academically challenged. Also, Mary helps Pastor Jeff avoid temptation with his girlfriend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Chaperone/ Employee of the Month

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: What I Like About Blue

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Peppa's Circus/ Night Animals/ Pirate Treasure/ Garden Games/ Going Boating

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Grandpa's Toy Plane/ Mr. Bull's New Road
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes, and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Toucan Do It!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Island of Lost Treasure

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Race to Sky High Mountain

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bo-ZAK That Whip
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the City of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting. Ivy finds his fun in the little things. Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories.

programme.title: Storage Wars: We Don't Use the 'S' Word Around Here
programme.desc: Rolling into Buena Park with their crew, Brandi and Jarrod pick up what may be the best of the worst. Kenny and his cousin glide through a locker that's only half decent. Ivy comes to the auction dressed to kill. Mary tries to turn up the volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Talking in Cody
programme.desc: In Moreno Valley, Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary’s fraternization with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Om Sweet Om
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in "Bourgie Brea," and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head-to-head on a giant pair of sister lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Cloudy With a Chance of Profit
programme.desc: It's a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Let's Give 'Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Dave travels to Murietta and is hoping his competition won't want to purchase a large locker they have to move. Justin snags a decent locker. Ivy and Ivy Jr. have a therapeutic day. Mary locates a little treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fowl Play
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Torrance and Dave sees an increase in his profits. It's positive news when Mary discovers some clothes that don't fit. Kenny tries a be an early bird, but winds up becoming the dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?
programme.desc: Mary and Ivy wager that each can better predict final locker prices than the other. Dave's locker closely resembles a chop shop, while Rene and Tatianna catch a stash of vintage sporting goods.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Sale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Ivy and Ivy Jr. clean up with their locker. Following on to Whittier, Kenny gets some advice from a music legend.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Wind Beneath My Bids
programme.desc: 30+mph winds batter Desert Hot Springs, and the buyers do their best to keep standing. Rene and Gunther dust off an old locker. Brandi and Jarrod's unit takes a turn and ends up lapping the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Not all that Glitters is Gourd
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies arrive in vintage style, though not everyone agrees. Darrell tries to peddle his wares to Emily.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mistress of the Snark
programme.desc: Ivy thinks he's a comedian in Stanton but the gizmo in his locker is no joke.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Drama in the LBC
programme.desc: Darrell and Dave wager on who got the better sister; locker, that is. Brandi and Jarrod spend way too much, but see their treasure soar.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Weekend at Barry's
programme.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dream Crusher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cell phones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlor, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sunday Supper
programme.desc: After a morning spent in church, Kardea Brown invites her family over for a scrumptiously southern Sunday supper. She serves up a few of her family's favourites for dinner, including fried chicken po' boys and her grandma's crab mac and cheese.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Berry Delicious Brunch
programme.desc: Kardea and her nieces are out on the farm to pick blueberries for brunch. Kardea whips up fluffy Blueberry Ricotta Pancakes with blueberry-honey sauce, Cheesy Baked Eggs with Potatoes and Mustard Greens and refreshing Honey Orangeade.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Lowcountry Lunch
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites a friend over to sit by the creek, share a great meal and watch the world go by. Her menu includes a Seafood Salad Roll with Charleston Shrimp and Blue Crab, Homemade Seasoned Chips and Creekside Custard Cups.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Backyard Fair

programme.title: The Kitchen: Raise the BBQ

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spring Into Summer

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer in a Snap
programme.desc: The Kitchen is keeping it easy and breezy for summer with recipes to make in a snap. Katie Lee makes sesame shrimp and greens with rice foil packs. The hosts make stuffed grilled avocados loaded with their favourite guacamole ingredients.

programme.title: Chopped: Food Truck Kitchen
programme.desc: The Chopped Kitchen is taken over by food truck chefs, steering toward success! The first basket contains ingredients from Chinese and Greek cuisines, while a classic American street food meets a fun-to-say Korean dish in the entrée basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Chocolate Competition
programme.desc: With chocolate in every basket of this themed competition, the chefs must figure out how to create savoury dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Bizarre Baskets!

programme.title: Chopped: Truck Stop Stars
programme.desc: Four talented truck stop chefs bring their renowned take on comfort food to the Chopped Kitchen. In the first round, meatloaf mix is a pleasant surprise, but some are not very familiar with fennel.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Demo Disaster

programme.title: Raven's Home: Say Yes to the Protest
programme.desc: Nia wants to take part in a protest to protect the environment, but first, she has to convince her mom to let her attend.

programme.title: Jessie: Panic Attack Room
programme.desc: Everyone gets trapped in the penthouse panic room after Stuart changes the passcode to get alone time with Zuri. Meanwhile, Bertram and Emma help Jessie with an upcoming audition.

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up
programme.desc: Jessie becomes threatened when Tony has to train a beautiful girl named Victoria as a doorman. Things get messy when Jessie's old boyfriend Ted comes to town and she finds herself attracted to him.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Space-Werewolf-A-Rooney
programme.desc: To prove to the skeptics that she is meant to star in 'Space Werewolves', Liv agrees to do all her own stunts, not realizing exactly how complicated they are.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Premiere-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When the premiere of Liv’s movie, 'Space Werewolves,' is scheduled for the same day as the beloved annual Stevens Point Cheddar-Brat Fest, Liv tries to make sure she can attend both events.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Last Dances and Last Chances
programme.desc: After Austin confesses to Carrie that he'd rather be at the prom with Ally, Carrie warns him that he'd better show her sister the best time ever. Trish runs back and forth between Jace and Chuck until Sun Hee takes Chuck back.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Directors & Divas
programme.desc: Dez gets an unexpected opportunity to direct a movie that Austin is in, but things prove problematic when he has to work with Austin's co-star, Brandy Braxton, a high-maintenance actress.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Pharaoh
programme.desc: A young historian gets akumatized into the all-powerful Pharaoh. He wants to bring an Ancient Egyptian princess back to life by sacrificing Alya. To save her, Ladybug and Cat Noir must face an army of mummies outside the Louvre!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mr. Pigeon
programme.desc: When park keepers banish him from feeding the pigeons, Mr. Ramier is transformed as Mr. Pigeon. Now able to communicate with the birds, he kidnaps the keepers and begins plans to turn Paris into a nature reserve for his bird friends.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Camp Wilderwood
programme.desc: When James gets homesick at Camp Wilderwood, he and his friend Miles hatch a plan to escape.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Dads and Daughters Day
programme.desc: When Sofia's class goes on a father-daughter trip to the Enchanted Animal Park, Sofia wonders if she truly belongs since Roland is her step-dad.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo help Uncle Stripe and Bandit play squash, spend the day with Nana, and Bingo has to learn to play alone!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Collector
programme.desc: Ladybug tries to uncover Hawk Moth's secret identity.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Prime Queen
programme.desc: Prime Queen wants to face Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Glaciator
programme.desc: A legendary Parisian ice-cream maker gets akumatized by Hawk Moth and becomes Glaciator, who turns people into ice cream.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Squatters' Fights
programme.desc: When Ava, Destiny, and Gwen discover that the Grizzly cabin has a much larger bathroom than theirs, they hatch a plan to convince the boys to switch.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Three Stars and a Baby
programme.desc: When Lou asks the campers to fill out counselor evaluations, Ava fears Destiny and Gwen's ratings and worries that her job may be in jeopardy.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Tesscue Me
programme.desc: Booker and Nia want to attend a high school party that Tess is going to, but Raven has already set up a game night.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sharp Job-jects
programme.desc: When Booker and Nia realize they have no money for all of their fun summer plans, they try to get assistant jobs with Raven's persnickety client, Priya.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con
programme.desc: A navy veteran is brutally stabbed in his senior living community. As detectives work to find the killer, they discover a persuasive con artist. Could this scammer have graduated from fraud to murder?

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: When a town councilwoman is gunned down in her home, the only evidence left behind is a bouquet of plastic roses. As detectives work to find the triggerman, they learn that the person calling the shots is closer to home than they originally thought.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Will to Kill
programme.desc: A retired farmer thinks he's struck gold after natural gas is found on his property. When he’s found dead and a family feud breaks out over his estate, detectives uncover a tale of lies, deceit and manipulation orchestrated by someone close to home.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Navy Nightmare
programme.desc: After the wife of a naval officer is shot dead in a parking lot, the case quickly hits a dead end. It's not until years later that a heinous murder plot unravels involving power, greed and deadly ambition by a mastermind willing to risk everything.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Devil in Delaware
programme.desc: A quiet town is rocked to its core when a brutalized corpse of a single father is discovered by the side of a residential road. Detectives are led down an unexpected path of betrayal, lies, manipulation and murder amongst friends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: Lisa and Kevin Knoefel seemed like the perfect couple. They were busy raising three children, and then welcomed a foster child too. When Sabrina admitted to killing Lisa, no one could understand why. This case was about to get very complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Shining Star
programme.desc: Chiquita Tate was growing her reputation as a tenacious defense attorney but her promising career was cut short when she was murdered. Police had a challenge. At work, she dealt with tough clients, and at home, she was going through a rough time.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secret Lives
programme.desc: Missing wife, grieving husband; turns out, both had secrets. Jen Ramsaran vanished just before Christmas and detectives needed to know if her online life held the key to this mystery or if the answer was closer to home.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Folie a Deux
programme.desc: When a fragile couple loses their child in a hotel robbery, Goren and Eames race against the clock to track down the missing child.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Lady's Man
programme.desc: A one-time murder suspect managed to bank on his notoriety to become a successful TV crime show creator. When he washes up dead in the East River, Goren and Earmes must track down his killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Passion
programme.desc: A poet sends his lover to persuade a foundation's president to keep funding a poetry journal. The lover reluctantly agrees but winds up dead on the street.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Life Is Fluid
programme.desc: Intelligence is in pursuit of Derek Keyes, number one on Chicago's most wanted list and a heroin kingpin. Halstead keeps trying to get through to Lindsay as her downward spiral continues.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Natural Born Storyteller
programme.desc: While pursuing a gangbanger, Burgess and Roman come across the body of an 8-year-old boy who was reported missing. Intelligence launches an investigation to find the killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Actual Physical Violence
programme.desc: A member of the team is held hostage by a man who is desperate to find his missing daughter. Elsewhere, Voight finds out that Bunny is bringing up new accusations on a case from his past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Debts of the Past
programme.desc: After surviving a hit against him, Voight is convinced the culprit is a criminal he and Olinksy once put away. At the district, Atwater accidentally spills information about Ruzek's past, which unsettles Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Climbing Into Bed
programme.desc: After a botched undercover job, Ruzek is under scrutiny by the new Street Deputy Crowley who will determine his future with the unit.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes/ Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: Suspicious deaths that were initially suspected as accidents, suicides or murders.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Count Dracula is talked into taking his family on a cruise vacation, and he and the ship's captain find themselves attracted to each other and begin dating, but Dracula's daughter Mavis doesn't trust her dad's new love interest.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Kent Always Say What You Want
programme.desc: Kent Brockman uses a shocking expletive during the nightly news broadcast and is fired when the FCC is tipped off. The dejected anchor takes refuge with the Simpsons and Lisa plots a way to get him his position back.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Towboy
programme.desc: Feeling that Maggie is getting too clingy, Marge hires a counsellor to teach her to become more independent. Meanwhile, Homer gets a little too carried away with his new job as a tow truck driver.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Don't Wanna Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
programme.desc: Marge convinces a bank robber, Dwight, to turn himself over to the police by promising to visit him in prison. When Marge fails to keep her promise, Dwight escapes to find her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Orphan Millie
programme.desc: When Milhouse's parents are lost at sea and presumed dead, his new orphan status makes him cooler than Bart. Meanwhile, Homer gets himself in hot water when he can't remember the colour of Marge's eyes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Husbands and Knives
programme.desc: Bart, Lisa and Milhouse check out a new comic book store called Coolsville and are treated like royalty. Meanwhile, Marge launches a gym for 'regular women,' and Homer fears she will dump him unless he gets into shape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Funeral for a Fiend
programme.desc: When Bart accidentally kills his nemesis Sideshow Bob, Bob's brother Cecil invites him to a memorial service with the intention of burying the hatchet for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eternal Moonshine of the Simpson Mind
programme.desc: Homer wakens on a snowy winter morning and has to reconstruct his memory of the previous night when he finds that Marge and the kids are nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E. Pluribus Wiggum
programme.desc: When Quimby pushes up the town's election, Springfield becomes the first city in the nation to hold a presidential primary. Springfield's citizens are less than happy with the candidates, so they embrace a write-in instead: Ralph Wiggum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: That '90s Show
programme.desc: Marge and Homer recount how Homer single-handedly started the grunge movement in the '90s. When Marge becomes attracted to a university professor, Homer gives up his job and focuses on his dream of being a musician.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Charlie Gets Crippled
programme.desc: When Charlie becomes wheelchair bound, the rest of the gang learns the perks of being handicapped. Meanwhile, Dennis and Dee's estranged father, Frank, returns to town in an attempt to reconnect with his children, who want nothing to do with him.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Goes Jihad
programme.desc: After a zoning mishap is caused by an overzealous new business neighbour, the gang realizes that they may lose part of their bar. After the return of Frank, Dennis and Dee's mother, Barbara, returns to the city to make Frank's life miserable.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis and Dee Go on Welfare
programme.desc: Dennis and Dee decide to quit their jobs at Paddy's and go on welfare so they can pursue their unrealistic dreams and goals. Meanwhile, Mac and Charlie experience the downside of not having Dennis and Dee around when Frank attempts to be a father figure.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Bangs Dennis' Mom
programme.desc: Jealous of Frank's newfound happiness, Barbara gets back at him by having sex with Mac. The gang uses sex for their own purposes, setting in motion a series of back-stabbing and deceptive moves.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Polnado Warning
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is busy with patients when the tornado sirens start blaring. The whole clinic, including pets and owners must head to the basement for their safety and ride out the storm.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: All Vets Are Off
programme.desc: We revisit spring, the busiest time of the year at the clinic. For Dr. Pol, that means long and tiring days. We check back on his search for another veterinarian.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udder Madness
programme.desc: Featuring emergencies with Dr. Pol and his staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Vet and Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol receives an emergency call from a client who finds her horse down and fears he may not make it. Suffering from a spinal cord injury, he decides to give the horse a cortisone shot.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Holy Bat Attack!
programme.desc: A bat bites Dr. Pol and a positive rabies test could endanger the health of his whole family. Dr. Brenda struggles to treat a puppy that swallowed a pork bone.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Down and Derby
programme.desc: Many appointments and calls have the team as busy as ever.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Green Goliath
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan is in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to find the elusive green sturgeon - an ancient fish that can grow up to seven feet long and live up to 70 years.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Shark!
programme.desc: To separate fact from fiction, Zeb Hogan is teaming up with some of Florida's leading shark experts on a quest to catch a river shark and to determine the truth behind their deadly reputation.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Giant Catfish
programme.desc: Zeb is on a mission to find out if the legendary giant catfish of the South really exists.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Salmonzilla
programme.desc: Many salmon go through Alaska's waters during mating season, but none of them compare to the elusive king salmon.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost City of El Mirador
programme.desc: After Josh Gates' epic investigations into the mysteries of the world, he sits down with his crew and specialists to discuss his greatest discoveries and most surprising revelations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Quest for the Ancient Ark
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Quest for the Ancient Ark
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Hidden Doomsday
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: John works with investigators to bring Frank Contreras into custody after he commits a terrible crime witnessed by a child; Cal takes on a heartbreaking case where authorities desperately need the public's help to identify a vicious criminal.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: See No Evil: Fire Angel
programme.desc: When she interrupts a burglary at home, Diane Pranske is abducted and left for dead across state lines. Detectives turn to surveillance video to find her assailant.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Red Christmas
programme.desc: In December 2003, police respond to a mysterious 911 call at a home in the tony Walnut Estates in Mansfield, Texas. When authorities enter they discover two bloodied bodies. The key to finding the killer is within one of the victim's grasp.

programme.title: American Cartel: Shots Fired
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Burbank, the murder of a police officer sparks an unprecedented manhunt and reveals clues that a local street gang might be connected to Mexico's most dangerous drug cartels.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Ghost
programme.desc: As the manhunt intensifies, the realization grows that the Vineland Boyz gang is more violent, more sophisticated, and stealthier than anyone had previously imagined. Decisions are made that will change the face of law enforcement forever.

programme.title: American Cartel: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: What began as the search to find Officer Matt Pavelka's killer quickly reveals a web of narcotics and violence that stretches across America, has infiltrated local government, and whose roots run all the way to El Chapo Guzman's Sinaloa Cartel.

programme.title: American Cartel: Shots Fired

programme.title: American Cartel: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: What began as the search to find Officer Matt Pavelka's killer quickly reveals a web of narcotics and violence that stretches across America, has infiltrated local government, and whose roots run all the way to El Chapo Guzman's Sinaloa Cartel.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Red Christmas
programme.desc: In December 2003, police respond to a mysterious 911 call at a home in the tony Walnut Estates in Mansfield, Texas. When authorities enter they discover two bloodied bodies. The key to finding the killer is within one of the victim's grasp.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Evil Beauty
programme.desc: When Matt Woods looked at Meri McCracken, he saw a beautiful woman, even though there had been rumors about Meri for years that earned her the nickname Crazy Meri. Matt chose to ignore it, but within months, his marriage was a living hell.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: The Face of Death
programme.desc: In 1988, Deborah Hunnewell fell for her co-worker, Scott Erskine. In a few months, they were tying the knot and expecting. Then Scott started acting strange. Before Deborah knew it, she was face to face with the devil--and it would haunt her forever!

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: James is a Marine living the American dream. His duty often takes him away from home, but he still provides for his family. While away his wife seeks companionship closer to home. A sordid affair culminates in an explosive revelation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Sometimes, a woman has a killer instinct when she meets her other half. These wicked women exert control over their partners to become the master puppeteer of a murderous plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Quick Hits: Deadly Doctor
programme.desc: A Canadian doctor chooses tragic retaliation over a failed relationship; an entitled woman will never take no for an answer; a grifting realtor dates her wealthy boss for access to his fortune.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Mysteries: Caught on Camera and the Mad Driver
programme.desc: A college bound teenage girl disappears from a department store without a trace. When her body is found, the search for her killer grows into a larger cause. Plus, a ride share driver on a shooting spree terrorizes a Michigan city one night in 2016.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods. Can police rescue him before it's too late?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: CutThroat Inc.
programme.desc: A man who killed his business partner and then hatched an elaborate plan to cover it up.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: CutThroat Inc.
programme.desc: A man who killed his business partner and then hatched an elaborate plan to cover it up.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Mystery at Palm Beach
programme.desc: After 30-year-old Lloyd Tobin is gunned down on a lakefront beach in Texas, his family launches their own investigation to help police solve the case. Then, more than 20 years later, closure comes from a surprising source.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Honeymoon Killers
programme.desc: A Belgian honeymoon comes to a tragic end when a freak car accident leads to a tragic death. The investigation takes police down a rabbit hole of violence and deceit, culminating in an international manhunt for a calculating killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Keeping the Dreams Alive

programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Raising a Massive Timber Frame Barn in Downtown Lewisburg
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work in downtown Lewisburg, West Virginia, to raise a massive timber frame as the new shelter for the Lewisburg farmer's market. The 200-year-old logs prove to be a challenge when the builders begin to raise the bents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down a Huge New England Style Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys make a rare trip north to dismantle an enormous, 200-year old barn. The barn is so big it takes extra hands to get the barnwood down, and a crane to lift out the valuable beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Tobacco Farm Cabin Into a Tasting Room
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save a log cabin from an old Virginia tobacco farm and to turn it into a tasting room for a local distillery.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Good Eats: Churn Baby Churn 2
programme.desc: After a visit from federal ice cream agents and investigating the ingredients, Alton cracks the code of making homemade ice cream.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dis-Kabob-Ulated
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the kabob with spicy beef kabobs and vanilla lime pineapple skewers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Yes We Have No Banana Pudding
programme.desc: Banana pudding fans will love to smile at these cool and cream topped puddings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin 2
programme.desc: Alton completes his strategy of getting your money's worth from the luxurious cut of meat known as beef tenderloin. We learn the legends and preparations of Carpaccio, Philly Cheese steak and the perfect Chateaubriand.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Houston, TX, one of the most dynamic and underrated food scenes in the United States. He digs into some classic Tex-Mex fare, loads up on the best brisket in town and gets a taste of the city's crave-worthy international cuisines.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Oakland
programme.desc: Andrew discovers the true soul of Oakland, CA, as he explores its diversity and sense of community. He visits a cozy breakfast joint, samples some of the city's freshest fare at Swan's Market.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Best Beef
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern travels the globe in search of the best beef dishes. He devours mind-blowing barbecue in Austin, TX, a massive porterhouse steak in Brooklyn, NY, asado in Argentina and wagyu grill in Japan.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts, where the fresh local catch is delivered to restaurants each day.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West

programme.desc: After an anonymous complaint is issued by one of their own, the hospital implements a non-fraternizing policy, causing the couples to panic. Meanwhile, Emma and Owen talk about the future, and Cristina and Meredith enjoy a little girl time.

programme.title: The Closer: Last Rites
programme.desc: The murder of a priest puts the squad on a collision course with the Catholic Church and drives a wedge between Brenda and Chief Pope. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents are in town while her father continues his cancer treatments.

programme.title: The Closer: Armed Response
programme.desc: A young couple hanging out in someone else's house find themselves in hot water when a security guard winds up dead in the street outside. Meanwhile, Raydor and Pope finally pinpoint the leak in the department.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: While the search for the missing boys continues, the squad faces off with an untrustworthy priest, an angry ex-husband, and threats from the F.B.I. Rusty startles Flynn and Sharon with a surprising request.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: As Major Crimes continues to search for the remaining St. Joseph's three, Sharon finds her personal life threatening her career.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: While dealing with a difficult personal matter, Commander Sharon Raydor continues to investigate the St. Joseph's three, their relationship with an overly protective priest and the possibility that two of the teens could be killers.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: As the case of the St. Joseph's three leads to its unexpected conclusion, Commander Sharon Raydor attempts to balance the case, her family arriving, and her fast approaching wedding to Lt. Andy Flynn.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: When a well-known attorney, celebrated for her defense of oppressed women is found dead, there is no shortage of high-profile suspects including her son, her ex-husband, a film director whose career she destroyed and a football player.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Killer Cookout

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Force Majeure
programme.desc: As a typhoon rocks the Bering Sea, the Summer Bay suffers a collision. Sig gambles all his pots in one spot, while Casey takes a scientific approach to finding the elusive Bairdi crab. John and Josh rush a pit stop to get the Time Bandit back in the hunt.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Restricted Zone

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: What Would Phil Harris Do?
programme.desc: With the Bairdi fishery open for the first time in years, Josh and John on the Time Bandit reopen the Phil Harris playbook and ask Casey and Sig to help tank the fleetwide quota. Wild Bill bets on Nick McGlashan to turn the tide for the Summer Bay.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Disaster Zones

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Eggs Lipoma
programme.desc: David is back to see Dr. Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. Nicole is depressed because of the bumps all over her neck. Steve has a noticeable lump on his forehead. Allen has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
