programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Learn why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Modern Family: iSpy
programme.desc: Claire and Phil decide to spy on Luke and Manny as they're hanging out with one of their more questionable friends. Meanwhile, Gloria is furious with Jay because she thinks he had a dream about another woman.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Feud
programme.desc: Phil is upset to have lost his elected office of social chair to his nemesis Gil Thorpe, and when he finds out Luke is competing against Gil's kid in a wrestling match, it becomes his own personal battle.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring-a-Ding-Fling
programme.desc: Cameron is in charge of the school's spring dance, but when a popular teacher returns from sabbatical, a bit of not-so-friendly competition blooms. With Claire on chaperone duty at the dance, Phil gets Haley to accompany him to the realtor's banquet.

programme.title: Modern Family: Moon Landing

programme.title: Modern Family: Las Vegas

programme.title: Modern Family: Starry Night

programme.title: Modern Family: Australia
programme.desc: The entire family tags along as Phil fulfills his mom's wish for him to return to his roots and visit the country where he was conceived: Australia. Unfortunately, Phil's attempts to embrace his native land are met by a lot of rejection.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Brunch Anniversary
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a special brunch for the family to celebrate her and her husband Nick's third wedding anniversary. There's shakshuka with feta, Brussel sprout and bacon hash, roasted potatoes with paprika mayo and pocket pastries for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mom Comes to Town
programme.desc: Molly's mom is visiting from Chicago to help with some garden planting and to enjoy a campfire supper. The menu includes hearty brisket tacos with pink pickled onions, charred sweet corn salsa and crispy smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dad's Midwest Concert
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's dad is in town to play a clarinet concert, and she's making an Asian-inspired lunch of succulent sugar-coated pork buns and crunchy drunken cucumber noodles to fill him up beforehand.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: A Trade for a Trade
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is teaching Nick to make brown butter buttermilk donuts in exchange for a welding lesson. Then, she makes a cozy Midwest dinner of chicken wild rice hotdish, deep fried broccoli and monster cookie bars for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: One-Pot Wonders
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cuts down on the cleanup with four one-pot recipes. The non-stick skillet is perfect for breakfast hash with fried eggs and a multi-pasta pot is all you need for loaded veggie pasta.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Care Package
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making care packages for her two daughters in college. She sends them homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies for something sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is focusing on quick and easy one-pan meals, starting with fresh and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps with Pico de Gallo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Chicken
programme.desc: It's chicken all ways as Ree Drummond whips up four quick and easy chicken dinners. For company, she makes Mustard Herb Chicken Cutlets and Garlic Spinach.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Take Five
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making four meals on four days, and they all have just five ingredients. For breakfast, she whips up Chilaquiles, a Mexican breakfast with Osage County style.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tale of Four Dinners

programme.desc: Pete builds a custom owl-inspired treehouse library that includes curved bookcases and kid-friendly designs. Then, an Arkansas family's dream become reality when Pete designs the ultimate bird watching spot.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.desc: Reza and MJ plan a trip to Palm Springs to celebrate Mike's birthday. Mike finds himself embroiled in scandal after his girlfriend, Paulina, calls him out for his wrongdoings with a series of screengrabs she sends to the crew.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Golden Years
programme.desc: Persian-American living a life of luxury try balancing social life, career and family.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Big Little Persian Lies

programme.title: Family Karma: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A close knit group of Indian friends and their families balance modern Miami living with their traditional Indian upbringings. When Vishal invites his future mother-in-law to the Diwali Gala, she spills the chai on how she really feels about his family.

programme.title: Family Karma: Family Fun in Flannel
programme.desc: With the dirt on his family out in the open, Vishal does what he does best: sweeps it back under the rug. This doesn't sit well with Anisha who looks to her close friend Bali for some no nonsense straight talk.

programme.title: Family Karma: A Game of Telephone

programme.title: Family Karma: Sari, Not Sari

programme.title: Family Karma: Frenemies for Life
programme.desc: After the fireworks of Diwali, Vishal hopes to repair his friendship with Anisha at Bali's not-so-Friendsgiving. Meanwhile, you could cut the awkward tension with a carving knife as Brian puts Monica on blast for stringing him along.

programme.title: Family Karma: Karma's a Beach
programme.desc: It's off to Key West for a weekend of fun, sun, and no supervision. Brian and Shaan butt heads, while Monica tests Anisha's patience with her 'good girl' image. Storm clouds gather when an innocent game takes a scandalous turn and Monica has had enough.

programme.title: Family Karma: I Kinda Don't Like You
programme.desc: Vishal prepares for the return of his mother-in-law Lopa, who badmouthed his family at the Gala. Meanwhile, Amrit throws a launch party for his new firm, but it turns into a circus when Monica, Anisha and Bali have it out in front of everyone.

programme.title: Family Karma: An Engagement to Remember

programme.desc: Was a man missing or was he hiding; on the surface it didn't make sense: he had a wife, a good job, a daughter he loved. Investigators were told he also had a secret and they went on an undercover mission to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patrick Frazee and Krystal Kenney
programme.desc: When Colorado mother, Kelsey Berreth, disappeared in 2018, the search for her would uncover a secret romance that burned with deadly passion. Featuring exclusive interviews with Kelsey's family friends and the investigators who broke the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Teresa Lewis and Matthew Shallenberger
programme.desc: When a husband and his adult son are murdered during a violent home invasion, the search for the killers exposes an illicit romance and family betrayal no one saw coming.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Tyonne Palmer and Tracy Burleson
programme.desc: When a preacher's wife is gunned down outside her Houston, Texas home, investigators uncover a sordid web of sin, sex, and a family feud with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Sonia Weidenfelder and Rick Spaulding
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a young mother in Oklahoma launches an investigation that reveals a vengeful romance and a murder conspiracy rooted in obsession and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Watching
programme.desc: It was a plot straight out of an Alfred Hitchcock film. A woman peers into a neighbor’s yard and catches a glimpse of something unsettling. What she saw and what she did set a chain of events in motion that would divide a family and a jury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: Life looks bright for a new college graduate. But when her beloved car is found abandoned, investigators race to find the missing girl. Weeks later, a psychic comes forward delivering unforeseen answers and an appalling twist no one sees coming.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: First Love, Last Breath
programme.desc: When a lovesick teen goes missing, investigators in Indiana learn she's harboring a deep secret. And when a couple of teens make a horrifying discovery in the woods, it's clear the secrets in one high school run darker and deeper than they imagined.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Don't Unlock the Freezer
programme.desc: Examine true-crime stories of victims found buried in the most unsuspecting of places.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Wisconsin to investigate an unsolved homicide. The case becomes personal after they receive a letter from the victim’s daughters. Their search uncovers a town’s dark side, crimes against children and lies within a church.

programme.title: Cold Justice: The Professor's End
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the strange death of a retired college professor in Tonya's home town, whose cremation was halted by an anonymous tip call, hinting at murder. An autopsy proves the tipster right.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Holding Onto Hope
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds return to their home state of Texas to look into the disappearance of a young mother in 2000, whose family has never given up on her. While some suspect murder, others claim to have seen her on the run with a mystery man.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Down By the Lake
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds answer the call of a grieving mother, whose 19-year-old son drowned while camping with friends. While the medical examiner ruled it an accident, some suspect foul play.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Will to Kill
programme.desc: A retired farmer thinks he's struck gold after natural gas is found on his property. When he’s found dead and a family feud breaks out over his estate, detectives uncover a tale of lies, deceit and manipulation orchestrated by someone close to home.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love, Springfieldian Style
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer get trapped in a tunnel of love, they entertain each other with their takes on the Bonnie and Clyde, the 'Lady and the Tramp' and the Sex Pistols romances.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Debarted
programme.desc: A new tough-talking kid teams up with Bart to pull off pranks. When Bart's pranks seem to backfire, Groundskeeper Willie warns him that he may have a rat in his group of friends. Bart must figure out who the backstabber is before it's too late.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dial 'N' for Nerder
programme.desc: Marge hires a nutritionist who puts Homer on a strict diet, but Homer decides to sneak in snacks and meals on the side. Bart and Lisa believe they are responsible for the accidental death of Martin Prince when their prank goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Papa Don't Leech

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mona Leaves-A

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri-Da
programme.desc: Peter and his friends are sick of forgetting the million-dollar business ideas they come up with while drinking, so they strap on Joe's police body cams to record their every move.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)

programme.title: Family Guy: Undergrounded

programme.desc: Officers and vets fight for the life of a canine crash victim.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Animal Rescue: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Kittens with blinding injuries and an emotional dog rescue you’ll never forget.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Unearthed: Legend of King Midas
programme.desc: King Midas and his legendary golden touch is one of the most famous tales in Greek mythology; now, using advanced archaeological methods, experts travel deep inside mysterious ancient mounds to investigate the truth behind the myth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: Mysteries of the Megastructures
programme.desc: The mysterious moai of Easter Island and the decapitated statues of Mount Nemrut have mystified experts for centuries. Now archaeologists using cutting-edge forensic analysis to reveal the secrets behind these ancient megastructures.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Quest for the Templar Treasure
programme.desc: The famous Templar treasure was reportedly taken from Jerusalem in the middle ages, but its whereabouts remain a mystery. Now, Jamie Theakston is on a quest to uncover the truth behind its elusive history and determine what may be its final resting place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Quest for the Templar Treasure
programme.desc: The famous Templar treasure was reportedly taken from Jerusalem in the middle ages, but its whereabouts remain a mystery. Now, Jamie Theakston is on a quest to uncover the truth behind its elusive history and determine what may be its final resting place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of Relic Mountain
programme.desc: The decapitated statues of Mount Nemrut and their eventual destruction have mystified experts for centuries. Now archaeologists decode cryptic inscriptions and use innovative geophysical analysis to reveal the mystery behind this ancient megastructure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey from the Center of the Sun
programme.desc: Discover how light escapes from the sun, from its fiery birth through its 430,000 mile battle against gravity and magnetism to its escape from the solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Birth of the Monster Black Holes
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal an astonishing supermassive black hole that was born during the earliest days of the cosmos, and finding out how this giant grew so large so quickly may help to explain the very formation of the universe itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: The Grand Tour
programme.desc: From the raging inferno of the Sun to the icy beauty of Pluto, experts investigate the secrets that have lingered in the solar system for billions of years in cutting-edge missions to infinity and beyond.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of the Sun
programme.desc: A brand-new NASA mission to the Sun reveals cutting-edge discoveries about Earth's star. As the Parker Solar Probe dives through the Sun's atmosphere, what it finds challenges everything we know about this strange place.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Journey to a Black Hole
programme.desc: Journey to the heart of the M87 supermassive black hole, the first and only black hole ever photographed, and explore the mystery of how it grew so large, what lies inside and how it controls the entire galaxy.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Aliens of the Microcosmos
programme.desc: The hidden kingdom of microscopic alien organisms shapes the universe as much as galaxies, stars, and planets. New discoveries reveal how bacteria, viruses, and other alien micro-organisms built life on Earth and influence humanity's future in the cosmos.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Going Places
programme.desc: A 39-year old woman, Melissa Lewis, has just made partner at a prestigious law firm, but when she is found murdered in a particularly personal manner.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Last Call at the Falls
programme.desc: When the nude body of a beautiful young woman is found wrapped in a blanket on the side of a desolate East New York parkway, investigators find themselves in a race against the clock to find her psychotic killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he's barking up the wrong tree. Then when an impromptu argument turns fatal, a suspect's guilt boils down to his skill with deadly weapons.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Wound Never Heals
programme.desc: Fresh-faced teen Barbara Rowan's family is devastated when she fails to come home one evening. Days later, she is found dead, but it will take three decades, a dogged cold-case detective, and advancements in crime technology to find Barbara's killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Officer Down
programme.desc: The small town of Higginson, Arkansas, only has two full-time police officers. When one of them is brutally gunned down on duty, everyone in the community wants answers.

programme.title: Body Cam: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: In California, police face off against a knife-wielding bodybuilder. A wanted criminal draws an officer into a brawl in a sex shop and a fleeing suspect drives a car directly at officers to escape.

programme.desc: Fresh-faced teen Barbara Rowan's family is devastated when she fails to come home one evening. Days later, she is found dead, but it will take three decades, a dogged cold-case detective, and advancements in crime technology to find Barbara's killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Officer Down
programme.desc: The small town of Higginson, Arkansas, only has two full-time police officers. When one of them is brutally gunned down on duty, everyone in the community wants answers.

programme.title: Body Cam: Cover Me
programme.desc: Two police officers respond to a domestic disturbance that ends in tragedy. A terrifying house fire turns into a murder investigation. The search for a known sex offender builds to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Crime Writer
programme.desc: Brook Baker, a college journalism major, dreamt of becoming an investigative reporter. When the popular co-ed is brutally murdered while researching a controversial article, the police must sort through hundreds of suspects to find her killer.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: Diane Holik, a vibrant 43-year old, is about to move from Austin to Houston to start a new life with her fiancé. When she misses a meeting at work police are called to her home. There they find her lifeless body and a killer who's left few clues behind.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Body in the Swamp
programme.desc: Miami businessman Henry Diaz goes missing the night before a family vacation. His business success has earned him many enemies… even within his own family. But before police can figure out who killed Henry Diaz, they'll need to find his body.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: My Strange Criminal Addiction: Quick Fix: Master Rick
programme.desc: Rick runs into trouble after performing castrations on men in his sex dungeon, and Katherine is an anorexic-bulimic who has been arrested more than 50 times for shoplifting groceries.

programme.title: My Strange Criminal Addiction: Quick Fix: Virtual Role-Player
programme.desc: Kimberly Jernigan meets the man of her dreams in Second Life and loses her grip on reality. Then Richard Walker's compulsion to masturbate in public sends him to prison, and two brothers are in and out of jail for grinding against women in NYC subways.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: How to Close a Homicide
programme.desc: After a string of deadly home invasions, Lt Rod Demery partners up with an ambitious rookie to track down a pair of murderous bandits and exonerate a man railroaded for a crime Demery is convinced he didn't commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Unknown Child
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a California restaurant parking lot. A tenacious investigator, a forensic sculptor and a report by 48 HOURS would help break the case. But identifying the girl was the first step. Would her killer be found? Harold Dow reports.

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Disappeared: Every Mother's Son
programme.desc: 20-year old Bear Diaz has diabetes, leaving him weak and vulnerable. When he vanishes in the night with his TV, backpack and cash, investigators must consider foul play. Then Skylar Tosic disappears, leaving people wondering if the cases are linked.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: In Summit Township, Michigan a mother is gunned down in her home in the middle of the night. Suspicion swirls around those close to her before a plot unravels to reveal how being in the wrong place at the wrong time can lead to paying the ultimate price.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Forest Builds
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage returns to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to get what they left behind from the first salvage. This time they concentrate on the outside including the roof tiles, windows, and the boiler room.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Masters
programme.desc: In Lexington, Texas folks line up early on Saturday mornings for Snow's BBQ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Rigs
programme.desc: Bill Rousseau transformed a retired Cessna airplane into a smoker.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Snoop to the Rescue
programme.desc: Open since 1946, Chili John's was rescued from imminent foreclosure three years ago by a retired Coast Guardsman and his wife. Overnight, COVID-19 knocked out both of their sources of income. Todd Graves brings in his team and Snoop Dogg to help.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Saving Smokey's
programme.desc: Todd Graves travels to Dallas to visit Smokey John's Bar-B-Que and Home Cooking, a restaurant built from the ground up and owned by two brothers carrying on their father's legacy. Todd must bring his business acumen to help the owners.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Let the Flames Begin!
programme.desc: The chefs are fired up to create unique signature dishes in the Wildfire Round. Where there's smoke, there's fire, and the Crossfire Round brings the heat.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Philly Food Fight
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Philadelphia for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: A Buzz in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Brooklyn to find the best deals for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South
programme.desc: Ali Khan has only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Savannah, Ga., for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack!

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Australia
programme.desc: Tony is off to discover what makes Melbourne, Australia's cultural capital, so special. Luckily for Tony he has many friends who are going to be taking him to sample the many cuisines offered.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puglia
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Puglia, a coastal region in the heel of Italy's boot. The area's simple but stunning dishes include orecchiette pasta, grilled octopus and stuffed pasticiotti pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: As Good as Mom's
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck, Curtis Stone and Andrew Zimmern talk about dishes that remind them of Mom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Top Lamb/ Molly Molly Mouthful
programme.desc: Lambie plays with Doc's new pink kitchen play set without permission and accidently breaks it, hurting herself in the process. Then, Doc's toy 'Molly Molly Mouthful' gets a flapjack stuck in her mouth when she tries to eat and talk at the same time.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Shell Shy/ Commander No
programme.desc: Doc helps a toy turtle named Theo to overcome his shyness. Also, Doc helps Commander Crush and all the toys learn that sometimes a game can be fun for one person and not for others.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: National Bob Day/ 7th Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Bob and the pugs head to the Baseball Hall of Fame. Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep on Food Truckin'
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Dad washes up on the beach of a desert island. Hairdressers Bluey and Bingo discover that their customer has nits! Bluey and Bingo wait for a rubber gecko to fall from the ceiling!

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cheese and Crockers/ Land Before Timmy
programme.desc: Timmy wishes up a machine that will allow him to merge with other objects for Half Day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: School of Crock
programme.desc: Mr. Crocker becomes a teacher at the Fairy Academy and tries to steal all the students' magic! Meanwhile, Poof is going through 'pooferty' and is finally learning to speak!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Home Improvement/ Undivided Attention
programme.desc: Laird is nervous to host movie night at his house, so Ronnie Anne helps him pretend Arturo’s pad is his own!/ Carlota can’t seem to pay attention to anything but her phone, so Carlos sets her up – with a math tutor!

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kings of the Con
programme.desc: The girls get more attention when accompany Lincoln and Clyde to the Ace Savvy convention dressed as the Full deck.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: It's Pony: Delivery Pony/ Magic Annie
programme.desc: Annie and Pony's new fruit and vegetable delivery service is threatened by a big corporation. Annie needs to find the perfect Mother's Day gift. Pony is convinced that Annie's magic trick is just the thing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Trenchbillies/ Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: Breadwinners
programme.desc: Two booty-shaking ducks operate a bread delivery service out of their rocket van.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: "Frozen Krabby Patty Commercial
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are in the frozen Krabby Patty commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat has a secret box that drives SpongeBob crazy; Squid recruits SpongeBob for his band.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dreamgoat/ The Same Game
programme.desc: Timmy feels sorry for the town's prize goat; everyone becomes the same.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Terrible Twosome/ App Trap
programme.desc: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof's terrible twos. Timmy wishes up the world's coolest smartphone. The phone has everything but it soon starts to take over Timmy's life.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crash Nebula
programme.desc: How Crash Nebula came to be.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Foul Balled/ The Boy Who Would Be Queen
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are useless, as they have switched genders in this wish mix.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Monsty
programme.desc: When Mika tries too hard to win Man’s Nest Employee of The Month, she creates a monster that could ruin the telethon Danger Force is hosting.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission Invisible
programme.desc: When the kids are caught on Principal Perry’s camera using bionics, getting the evidence out of her hands becomes their most important mission yet.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Welcome to Walk the Prank
programme.desc: Follow four kids' antics at school and at home, which provide a source of inspiration for their pranks.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Crushed
programme.desc: Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Best Thing Since Slice Bread
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Not the Mama
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: A Tale of Two Stans
programme.desc: Stan decides to run for Mayor of Gravity Falls to earn the kids’ and the townsfolk respect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Delivery of Destiny/ Let's Bounce
programme.desc: Follow Paul the Delivery Man as he journeys through his usual stops.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Bleeped/ Sellouts
programme.desc: Cricket is amused by a new socially unacceptable word in his big city world and tempts fate by repeating it. Then, the Greens try new methods to improve sales at their produce stand.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Dead Man's Drop/ Stumped
programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Runaway Recital/ Trike X-5
programme.desc: Kick's dad forces him to learn the piano, but Kick decides to turn it into a stunt that spans the whole town. Kick's sister steals his first stunt bike and turns it into a girly bike.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Knocked Out/ Not Without My Cereal
programme.desc: Gunther gets in the way of Kick's stunt career/ Kick must look after his sister.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Dancing With the Enemy/ Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: When Kick gets paired with his nemesis in a dance competition, they must put their differences aside and combine their styles in order to win. Later, Kick devises a plan to stop his nosy neighbour's incessant tattling.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Morning Rush/ A Fistful of Ice Cream
programme.desc: In order to not fail the school year, Kick has one night to complete all of his missed homework assignments; To give his dad the best birthday gift ever, Kick tracks down a rare ice cream treat.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Dad's Car/ The Treasure of Dead Man Dave
programme.desc: Kick is about to be blamed for scratching Dad's car; Kick has to give an oral report.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone

programme.desc: Two young men from Kansas dated the same woman and appear in court to find out if either of them fathered her 18-month-old baby girl.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Tillis vs. Jalik
programme.desc: An Oklahoma City construction worker had a "friends with benefits" relationship for two years, but denies fathering his lover's newborn son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Alfred is suing Cesar for $3,950, $1,000 for the security deposit and $950 in money borrowed from his co-worker and punitive damages. Cesar says he owes Alfred nothing since he broke the terms of the lease and damaged his property.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff hired the defendant to do a photo shoot for her daughter’s birthday, but claims he never delivered the photos, so she’s suing.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include ''Fouling Up a Friendship ' and 'Taking Too Long.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Getting Painted Into a Corner ' and 'Getting a Tenant Hot.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: House Sitter From Hell/ Leading Lady
programme.desc: A house sitter throws a party at neighbor’s house; a lead actress fails to fulfil her commitment for a play.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tomasz is suing Yelitza for the cost of repairs as her leaky bathtub flooded his bathroom, damaging his ceiling and walls. Yelitza says Tomasz was the one with the leak, and his attempts to fix it made it worse.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Had My Son Killed...Those Aren't His Kids
programme.desc: Vanessa's boyfriend Ahlon was gunned down tragically before the birth of their son. Now, his mother Tevis says that Vanessa planned the attack. Ahlon's family is also denying the paternity of Vanessa's newborn son.

programme.title: Maury: Test Our Twins ... You Cheated and One Twin Isn't Mine!
programme.desc: Ashley is convinced her husband is a liar and a cheater. Scottie thinks Ashley is sneaky and that the twins he’s been raising aren’t his. They both have levied strong accusations against each other, but the test results have the final say in this family.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Panty Proof
programme.desc: Courtney is about to faceoff with her boyfriend Justin’s mistress, Brooklyn! He introduced Courtney to Brooklyn initially so they could be friends and Courtney would have someone to hang out with.

programme.title: Maury: Don't Let My Sister Fool You ... That's Not Your Baby!
programme.desc: Kim's sister Kendralyn spread a rumour, and now her man Kenneth is denying her baby. Jason's family don't want him not to sign Shelley's baby birth certificate. Now he wants a DNA test. Que says Airiona's a gold-digger and he's not her baby's father.
